title: Public-Fact Research & Reference Data Collection
description: Gather and record current public-domain reference data needed for the Chen engagement in the assumptions-and-disclosures section. Required research areas: 2024-2025 federal tax brackets (especially 32% threshold for MFJ), California state tax brackets (9.3% marginal threshold), RSU taxation rules (ordinary income treatment, withholding requirements), SECURE 2.0 RMD age thresholds (73 for those born 1951-1959), LTC insurance average premium benchmarks for couples in their mid-50s, step-up basis rules under IRC 1014 for inherited real estate, current gift tax annual exclusion limits, and ACA/COBRA premium estimates for healthcare bridge planning. Each fact must include source citation and effective date.
